steps.title: Find each total height
steps.content:
Mean equals total divided by count, so total equals mean times count:
$$80(40)=3200$$
$$45(65)=2925$$

steps.title: Divide by the combined count
steps.content:
Data set C contains all $125$ buildings, so its mean is
$$\frac{3200+2925}{125}=\frac{6125}{125}=49.$$

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The mean of data set C is 49 meters.
